name: egi-web-monitoring
description: EGI Website Monitoring Platform — monorepo workspace

scripts.build: npm run build -w @egi/database && npm run build -w @egi/shared-types && npm run build -w @egi/queue && npm run build -w @egi/monitoring-rules && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @egi/shared-types && npm run build -w @egi/queue && npm run build -w @egi/monitoring-rules
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio
